subject: A robed figure in black armor and a dark mask/helm, arms spread wide with open hands, purple magical energy at the chest; urban street background
description: A tall figure stands in a forward-facing pose with both arms extended outward and slightly down, hands open and fingers spread — no weapon in hand. The figure wears a long black flowing coat or cape and segmented dark armor plating on the chest, with a dark masked helm obscuring the face. Purple-black magical energy glows at the center of the chest. The skin of the hands and lower arms appears distinctly pale grey-purple. The background is a dimly lit urban street with indistinct structures in low saturation blues and greys. The posture conveys command and menace, as if drawing something toward the figure or projecting power outward.
foreground: The figure, full torso visible; hands open, purple glow at chest
background: Dimly lit urban street, indistinct architecture
